items.code: Hello

items.title: Form Basics
items.code:
<form method="post" action="/submit">
  <label>
    Email
    <input name="email" type="email" autocomplete="email" required />
  </label>

  <label>
    Password
    <input name="password" type="password" minlength="8" required />
  </label>

  <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
</form>
